allow: PowerShell(Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; \(Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -eq $null)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "claude" }; npm list -g --depth=0 2>$null | Select-String "claude")
